title: Vanilla Remaked
description: Better optimization and an improved experience while preserving the core of Vanilla Minecraft.
body:
# About
This mod makes the game more optimized and provides a better gameplay experience while preserving vanilla Minecraft.

# Highlighted Features
1. All OptiFine resource packs work in this pack.
1. Your FPS increases by using Sodium and similar optimizations. Additionally, RAM usage is significantly reduced by using FerriteCore.
1. Enchanted books have a more distinctive texture.
1. F3 is more modern, customizable, and configurable.
1. You can see the enchantments on your items directly in your hotbar without opening your inventory.
1. Leaves have a more realistic appearance.
1. You can easily see how to brew any potion in the brewing stand.
1. You can pin your worlds and servers to the top by starring them.
1. Mob, player, cape, and elytra animations are more realistic.
1. You can see the enchantments on your items directly in your hotbar without opening your inventory.

and more!

**IMPORTANT NOTE: As you go to lower versions, certain features may not be available. Only the latest two versions receive updates.**

# Performance Test
Modpack, No Resource Packs, Fullscreen - 32 Chunk, Fancy
![Modpack, No Resource Packs, Fullscreen - 32 Chunk, Fancy](https://i.imgur.com/xCOLQsJ.png)
Modpack, 11 Resource Pack, Fullscreen - 32 Chunk, Fancy
![Modpack, 11 Resource Pack, Fullscreen - 32 Chunk, Fancy](https://i.imgur.com/LX93PzO.png)
OptiFine, No Resource Packs, Fullscreen - 32 Chunk, Fancy, OF Performance Settings ON
![OptiFine, No Resource Packs, Fullscreen - 32 Chunk, Fancy, OF Performance Settings ON](https://i.imgur.com/CtnPWBR.png)
